text:
Virtual Restaurant バーチャルレストラン - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and as such is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Virtual Restaurant バーチャルレストラン - This card allows the caster to dine in a virtual restaurant. You are able to order and eat anything you want to. You will feel as though you have eaten all of that food but it's only an illusion. As such, you are only fooling your brain and your body will probably suffer from malnourishment. To prevent this from happening, you are given a multivitamin tablet on your way out.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.063 :: バーチャルレストラン 
頼めばどんな料理でも出してくれる。満腹感を得られるが、実際には食べた気になっているだけで何も腹に入っていない。最後に栄養剤をくれる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.063 :: Virtual Restaurant 
You can have any cooking you ask for. You obtain the feeling of fullness, but nothing is in your stomach and it only feels like you have. You are given nutrients at the end.
|}
